tagline: New authoring skills for Genie Agents improve usability and accuracy.
what_it_does: The Genie Agent now includes enhanced authoring skills that allow users to create and maintain agents more effectively. Users can test agents with real-world questions, review generated SQL and visualizations, and provide feedback to improve accuracy. Additionally, the system supports monitoring agent usage and user feedback to refine responses over time.
why_it_matters: These enhancements enable data teams to create more accurate and responsive Genie Agents, leading to improved user satisfaction and productivity. By allowing for real-time feedback and adjustments, organizations can ensure their agents remain relevant and effective as business needs evolve, ultimately driving better decision-making.
plain_summary: Genie Agents now have improved tools for creation and maintenance, making them more accurate and user-friendly.

capabilities.title: Testing with Real Questions
capabilities.desc: Users can interact with the Genie Agent by asking realistic questions to evaluate its performance.

capabilities.title: Response Feedback Mechanism
capabilities.desc: Users can provide feedback on responses, allowing for continuous improvement of the agent's accuracy.

capabilities.title: SQL Query Review and Editing
capabilities.desc: Authors can review and edit generated SQL queries to correct inaccuracies and save improvements.

capabilities.title: Usage Monitoring
capabilities.desc: The Monitor tab allows users to track agent performance, user interactions, and feedback trends.

prerequisites: Users must have appropriate permissions (e.g., CAN MANAGE, CAN EDIT) to access all features.
Genie Code must be enabled for debugging and context updates.
use_cases: Data teams can refine agents based on user feedback to improve accuracy.
Business users can interact with agents to obtain insights from data without needing technical expertise.
Organizations can monitor agent performance over time to identify areas for improvement.
limitations: Responses may vary due to the non-deterministic nature of large language models.
Conversations created before enabling Genie Chat Sharing remain private.

steps.title: Create a Genie Agent
steps.desc: Follow the setup instructions to create a new Genie Agent.

steps.title: Test the Agent
steps.desc: Use realistic questions to evaluate the agent's responses.

steps.title: Provide Feedback
steps.desc: Respond to agent outputs to flag inaccuracies and suggest corrections.

steps.title: Review SQL Queries
steps.desc: Inspect and edit generated SQL queries as needed for accuracy.

steps.title: Monitor Usage
steps.desc: Utilize the Monitor tab to track interactions and feedback trends.

key_takeaway: The enhancements to Genie Agents empower users to create more accurate and responsive data-driven solutions.
